description: From the manufacturer About us Merriway has been established as a manufacturer and distributor of hardware, DIY and furniture fittings to the Trade for more than 22 years. The company embraces the values of competitive on a broad product range backed up with large stocks. Our premises have grown along with the business and now cover a floor area of more than 50,000 sq ft, whilst our workforce numbers close to 100 people. We achieved ISO 9001 accreditation (ISO 9001 in July 2011), upgrading from our previous status of ISO 9002, thereby receiving approval for the quality of our management systems , illustrating how seriously we take these issues and how hard we work at them.
